pre_commit.description: Strict inventory, drift, full tests, browser smoke (Playwright), API+Madeira smoke, release gate

steps.description: Strict full AKOS inventory (OVERALL: PASS)
Repo vs runtime drift (agent/A2A inventory, tools policy)
Full pytest suite via scripts/test.py all
Browser smoke; Scenario 0 registry (Playwright per DEVELOPER_CHECKLIST)
FastAPI control plane + Madeira interaction
Unified release gate (HLK, process_list header, vault links, ...)
Initiative 48: operator UAT dossier snapshot (markdown only; writes artifacts/uat-dossier/)
Initiative 49 P12: offline brand-voice fast-lint of external prose defaults (deck story + slides; frontmatter and inline backtick paths skipped per BRAND_JARGON_AUDIT §4 scope).

Initiative 79 P2: anti-jargon drift gate over People canonicals (D-IH-79-N). Forbids Tech-Lab framework names, infra jargon, and codenames in People-owned canonicals; Tech Lab canonicals are out of scope and may carry framework names freely.

Initiative 86 P1 (D-IH-86-H): INITIATIVE_REGISTRY notes 'Program anchors:' prefix FK-resolves to PROGRAM_REGISTRY.csv. Stage A advisory (validator no-ops rows without the prefix; Stage B promotes anchors to a first-class column at I86 P2 / D-IH-86-J).

Initiative 89 P0 (D-IH-89-E, 2026-05-17): BBR dual-register drift gate flipped from INFO to FAIL. Scans external surfaces (boilerplate/, _assets/advops/**/deck/, **/dossier_*.md, **/founder-filed/, **/adviser-handoff/, hlk-erp public surfaces) for internal-register tokens (PRJ-HOL-*, counterparty, elicitation, etc.) per BRAND_BASELINE_REALITY_MATRIX.md §3. Required from day one; CI-block expected on 7 pre-existing PRJ-HOL-FOUNDING-2026 leaks in ENISA founder-filed dossiers until ADVOPS triage closes OPS-86-5. Hot-fix lane: AKOS_BRAND_BASELINE_REALITY_SOFT=1 env var temporarily downgrades to advisory.

I86 Wave E (D-IH-86-P, 2026-05-19) + Wave F closure (D-IH-86-Q, 2026-05-19): External-render discipline drift gate. Scans external-tagged surfaces under _assets/advops/**, _assets/touchpoint-kit/**, Think Big/Advisers/**, Marketing/Brand/** for paired render artifacts (PDF/Web/ERP/Mail/Slide/Broadcast). Audience-class to render-format matrix per akos-external-render-discipline.mdc RULE 2. Promoted INFO -> FAIL on 2026-05-19 (D-IH-86-Q) once render-pending-tracker.md reached zero entries; now runs with --strict (require trail for every external surface) + --strict-freshness (source_sha256 must match current sha). Template surfaces (artifact_kind: deck_template) and J-OP-only surfaces are exempt. Demotion procedure (soft/hard) per SOP-EXTERNAL_RENDER_GATE_PROMOTION_001 section 6.

I86 Wave F (D-IH-86-P sibling + operator B1 ratify, 2026-05-19) + Wave G Bundle B-G1 closure (D-IH-86-R, 2026-05-19): Locale-orthography drift gate. EN promoted to --strict-en after Wave G B-G1 shipped render-step auto-curl + post-curl validator semantics: the EN smart-quote scan now applies apply_smart_quotes(body, 'en') before counting straight quotes, so the gate reads delivery-surface typography (post-curl) rather than source-keystroke convenience. ES + FR remain advisory pending operator ratification of strict promotion. Word-list catalogue per locale lives in akos/orthography.py (ES diacritic/tilde; FR diacritic/cedilla; EN post-curl threshold). Per-locale promotion: --strict-es / --strict-fr stay opt-in. AKOS_LOCALE_ORTHOGRAPHY_STRICT=1 env enables all-strict. Language-untagged surfaces are no-op (skip).

I86 Wave H Lane E (D-IH-86-AB proposed; canonical row appended by parent after Lane A + Lane C land, 2026-05-19): canonical-enrichment-freshness drift gate. Operator-ratified 3-tier staleness (3 days short / 30 days medium / 90 days long-term) per operator quote 'Option D but make it 3 days, because we're real fast today'. Scans `docs/references/hlk/v3.0/Admin/O5-1/**/canonicals/**/*.md` for `last_review_at:` (preferred) or `last_review:` (fallback) frontmatter, categorises every surface into fresh / medium / long-term / stale, and emits a per-area summary table to stdout. Paired Pydantic chassis at akos/canonical_freshness.py (FreshnessThresholds + CanonicalFreshnessRow + FreshnessAreaSummary). Paired SOP `SOP-TECH_CANONICAL_FRESHNESS_AUDIT_001` mint pending. Runs INFO-only at mint per the L86 Lane E acceptance contract; promoting to FAIL is a successor wave decision once long-term + stale rows have been triaged via per-wave-boundary checklist.

I78 P2 (D-IH-78-CLOSURE Wave H lane-1, 2026-05-19) — INFO advisory self-test for the brand-voice LLM-as-judge chassis. Exercises akos/brand_voice_judge.py Pydantic models + scripts/judge_brand_voice.py mock provider round-trip (2/2 verdicts: PASS exemplar + FAIL paraphrase exemplar) + cache-key determinism. The judge runs one layer above the deterministic Pack A1 regex floor (validate_brand_voice_register.py) as advisory semantics. Production prose-scanning rollout is gated on Strand C bias-audit cadence + Strand D D-IH-78-PROMOTE ratify, both forward-chartered to a strict-mode-promotion follow-up initiative per I78 cluster-burndown axis-2 pragmatic-closure executive call.

I81 P1 (D-IH-81-K Wave H lane-2, 2026-05-19) — INFO advisory KB integrity baseline audit per master-roadmap §3 P1 deliverable. Walks process_list.csv executable rows (item_granularity in {task, process}) + joins KNOWLEDGE_PAIRING_REGISTRY.csv + v3.0 SOP corpus scan + cadence column; emits matrix CSV + audit narrative under docs/wip/planning/81-vault-integrity-layout-milestones-retrofit/reports/i81/. PASS threshold ≥ 95% per D-IH-81-F gates at I81 P9 closure UAT (not here at P1 baseline) — pass_rate is expected to be near-zero at baseline because audience_tags_status is deferred for every row pending I85 wire follow-up. The metric becomes meaningful as P4-P8 retrofits land + the I85 wire commit flips audience_tags_deferred → audience_tags_matched. Pydantic chassis: akos/hlk_kb_integrity.py (KbIntegrityMatrixRow + KbIntegrityAuditSummary). Paired runbook per akos-executable-process-catalog.mdc RULE 1.

I76 P1 (D-IH-76-D phase closure 2026-05-19): paired runbook for MADEIRA_MODE_PARITY.md canonical. Parses §3.1 mode-enum table + cross-checks against akos.hlk_madeira_mode CANONICAL_REGISTRY; FAILs on missing/extra/mismatched mode rows. The 5-mode taxonomy (Ask + Plan + Agent + Debug + Methodology) is the substrate for I76 P2 tool RBAC + I76 P3 persistence/personality SOPs + I76 P4 AICs F5 dispatcher.

I76 P2 (Wave H 2026-05-19): canonical-CSV validator for MADEIRA_TOOL_RBAC.csv. Enforces header parity, per-row Pydantic schema (tool_id pattern, 3-value per-mode permission enum, conditional_constraint semantics: non-empty when any cell is conditional + empty when none are), tool_id uniqueness across rows. --strict flag promotes last_review_decision_id FK-resolution to FAIL (default: advisory WARN).

I76 P3 (Wave H 2026-05-19; D-IH-76-F): canonical-CSV validator for MADEIRA_PERSISTENCE_VEHICLE_REGISTRY.csv. Enforces header parity (21 cols), per-row Pydantic schema (vehicle_id pattern, 9 Literal enums for scope/audience/write_authority/cadence/posture/provenance/memory_class/status/methodology_version, target_audience semicolon-list with no duplicates, topic_ids + depends_on_vehicle_ids pattern + format, staleness_days+staleness_posture alignment via model_validator catching stale-constraint drift), registry-level uniqueness + depends_on_vehicle_ids closure across rows. --strict flag promotes both last_review_decision_id FK-resolution against DECISION_REGISTER.csv AND topic_ids FK-resolution against TOPIC_REGISTRY.csv to FAIL (default: advisory WARN). 16-row seed at I76 P3 mint (11 active + 4 planned + 1 inactive Cursor memory placeholder).

dossier_smoke.description: Initiative 48 P9: standalone dossier snapshot smoke (same argv as pre_commit dossier_smoke step)

steps.description: Render operator UAT dossier markdown via snapshot mode

compliance_mirror_emit.description: Initiative 14/18/21: preflight CSV row counts then emit compliance mirror upsert SQL to artifacts/sql/compliance_mirror_upsert.sql (operator reviews before DB apply). Now also covers GOI/POI, adviser disciplines, adviser open questions, and founder filed instruments.

steps.description: Row counts from git CSVs (process_list, baseline, FINOPS counterparty register, GOI/POI, adviser disciplines/questions, filed instruments)
Write full mirror upsert SQL (process_list + baseline + all Initiative 21 registers) for operator review

export_adviser_handoff_smoke.description: Initiative 21 / P7: render the adviser handoff bundle for all disciplines as Markdown to artifacts/exports/handoff-smoke.md (no PDF). Operator runs before sending real handoffs.

steps.description: Render ADVOPS handoff (all disciplines, MD) for PRJ-HOL-FOUNDING-2026

export_adviser_handoff_pdf_smoke.description: Initiative 22 / P6: render the adviser handoff bundle as PDF via WeasyPrint to artifacts/exports/handoff-smoke.pdf. SKIPs gracefully when WeasyPrint+markdown are not installed (install via `py -m pip install -r requirements-export.txt`).

steps.description: Render ADVOPS handoff (all disciplines, PDF) for PRJ-HOL-FOUNDING-2026

optional_executor_harness.description: Optional pytest oracle (set AKOS_EXECUTOR_HARNESS=1 before running)

steps.description: Executor harness optional tests

wave2_backfill_check.description: Wave-2 (Initiatives 23-26) operator-answers sentinel scan: prints per-section counts of __OPERATOR_CONFIRM__ tokens remaining in docs/wip/planning/22a-i22-post-closure-followups/operator-answers-wave2.yaml. Always exits 0 (informational); the YAML is operator-filled at their pace and downstream phases gate on individual sections.

steps.description: Sentinel scan for operator-answers-wave2.yaml

compliance_mirror_drift_probe.description: Initiative 23 P4: verify parity between canonical compliance CSVs and live Supabase mirror row counts. The probe is operator-pasted: run `--emit-sql` to print the JSON SELECT for user-supabase MCP `execute_sql`, paste the JSON result into `artifacts/probes/mirror-drift-<YYYYMMDD>.json`, then re-run with `--verify` (the default). SKIPs gracefully when no fresh artifact exists (does not block CI).

steps.description: Verify the latest artifacts/probes/mirror-drift-*.json against canonical CSV row counts

render_topic_graph_smoke.description: Initiative 25 P3: render the cross-program topic graph from `dimensions/TOPIC_REGISTRY.csv` to `_assets/_meta/topic_graph.{mmd,png,svg}` via `scripts/render_topic_graph.py`. The script reuses `render_km_diagrams.py` for the PNG/SVG pipeline (mmdc preferred, mermaid.ink HTTP fallback). Operator runs after any topic-registry row change.

steps.description: Render _assets/_meta/topic_graph.{mmd,png,svg} from TOPIC_REGISTRY.csv

render_km_diagrams_batch_smoke.description: Initiative 25 P8: dry-run discovery of every `.mmd` under `docs/references/hlk/v3.0/_assets/` to confirm the batch-render contract. `--dry-run` prints what would render without invoking mmdc / mermaid.ink. Useful as a CI canary that the topic + KM Mermaid sources stay parseable + discoverable.

steps.description: Dry-run batch render of every .mmd under _assets/

export_adviser_handoff_html_smoke.description: Initiative 24 P5: render the adviser handoff bundle as HTML to artifacts/exports/handoff-smoke.html. Single-file HTML envelope wrapping the MD body — paste-into-email-client friendly. SKIPs gracefully when canonical CSVs are absent (output script handles this).

steps.description: Render ADVOPS handoff (all disciplines, HTML) for PRJ-HOL-FOUNDING-2026

render_pmo_hub_smoke.description: Initiative 25 P5: verify the PMO hub stakeholder index auto-generated section is in parity with canonical CSVs. Runs render_pmo_hub.py --check-only; FAILs on AUTOGEN_DRIFT_DETECTED or MARKER_NOT_FOUND. Operator runs `py scripts/render_pmo_hub.py` to refresh, then commits.

steps.description: Verify PMO hub stakeholder index is in parity with canonical CSVs

render_km_diagrams_batch_smoke.description: Initiative 25 P8: render every .mmd under docs/references/hlk/v3.0/_assets/ via render_km_diagrams.py --all --dry-run. Surfaces diagram source discovery without touching .png/.svg sidecars. Operator runs `py scripts/render_km_diagrams.py --all` to refresh all rasters when needed.

steps.description: Discover all .mmd sources and report what would render (no writes)

wip_dashboard_render_smoke.description: Initiative 32 P10: verify the WIP dashboard auto-rendered section is in parity with each initiative's master-roadmap.md frontmatter. Runs render_wip_dashboard.py --check-only; FAILs on drift. Operator runs `py scripts/render_wip_dashboard.py` to refresh, then commits.

steps.description: Verify WIP dashboard is in parity with each initiative master-roadmap

neo4j_governance_kg_drift_smoke.description: Initiative 46 P2: nightly drift canary comparing Neo4j label counts to canonical CSV row counts. SKIPs gracefully when Neo4j unconfigured. CSV-only mode prints CSV count summary without touching Neo4j.

steps.description: scripts/graphrag_drift_canary.py - asserts each axis-6 dimension is within tolerance (default 1 row)

playwright_a11y_smoke.description: Initiative 54 P5: Playwright + axe-core a11y smoke audit on madeira_control + dossier HTML surfaces. Pre-commit: warn-only when axe-playwright-python is not installed (SKIP gracefully per R-54-1). Release-gate: Critical-only fail (D-IH-54-A). Run with: py scripts/browser-smoke.py --playwright --axe.

steps.description: Run tests/playwright/ DOM-source contract + wiring tests (run without Playwright installed; SKIP for live conditional-render tests when render_dossier_html signature differs).

scripts/browser-smoke.py --playwright --axe. SKIPs when Playwright workers unusable or axe-playwright-python missing (per R-54-1 / R-54-4). Emits Critical/Serious counts per in-scope surface in JSON_RESULTS for downstream gating.

regression_loop_smoke.description: Initiative 55 P6: smoke run of the regression-to-advisor continuous loop tooling. Tier A only (no LLM cost; no SMTP). Verifies regression_artifact_diff.py + propose_advisor_update.py contracts, including the both-signal-and-silence telemetry path (D-IH-55-E). Does NOT fire G-24-3 (per-fire IRREVERSIBLE; operator-only).

steps.description: Run tests/test_regression_artifact_diff.py + tests/test_propose_advisor_update.py (34 tests covering threshold parsing, evaluate, render, append, main).

cicd_baseline_check.description: Initiative 68 P2 + P4 + P5: standalone CICD-baseline + observability validator suite. Today wraps `validate_playwright_baseline.py` (P2 / D-IH-68-B), `validate_sentry_release_format.py` (P4 / D-IH-68-I), and `validate_cicd_baseline.py` (P5 / D-IH-68-D). Set `AKOS_PLAYWRIGHT_BASELINE_SCAN_CONSUMERS=1` / `AKOS_SENTRY_RELEASE_SCAN_CONSUMERS=1` / `AKOS_CICD_BASELINE_SCAN_CONSUMERS=1` to enable consumer-repo scanning (default-off until sibling-repo carry-overs land + canonical CSV gate at PAUSE POINT #3 ships the new REPOSITORY_REGISTRY.csv columns).

steps.description: Validate the AKOS canonical Playwright config template + optionally each consumer-repo's playwright.config.ts (per `AKOS_PLAYWRIGHT_BASELINE_SCAN_CONSUMERS` env var)
Validate the AKOS canonical Sentry dashboard doc + optionally each consumer-repo's Sentry init code (per `AKOS_SENTRY_RELEASE_SCAN_CONSUMERS` env var)

Validate the AKOS canonical SOP-CICD_BASELINE_001 + GitHub Actions workflow template + Render YAML stub + optionally each REPOSITORY_REGISTRY.csv row's ci_baseline_* columns (per `AKOS_CICD_BASELINE_SCAN_CONSUMERS` env var)

eval_harness_smoke.description: Initiative 45 P6: pre_commit-eligible smoke run of the unified eval harness. Tier A only (deterministic; no LLM cost). Combines smoke + canary + rubric + replay + adversarial modes.

steps.description: Run scripts/eval.py --mode all + --mode replay + --mode adversarial under Tier A
Replay all cassettes (Tier A; no LLM cost)
Adversarial cassette suite (12 probes; 3 vectors)
Cassette PII linter (R-45-4 enforcement)

engagement_model_registry_smoke.description: Initiative 73 P1: standalone ENGAGEMENT_MODEL_REGISTRY validator smoke (D-IH-73-C sibling-dimension; D-IH-73-D 7-class taxonomy). Runs scripts/validate_engagement_model_registry.py against the canonical CSV at docs/references/hlk/v3.0/Admin/O5-1/People/People Operations/canonicals/dimensions/ENGAGEMENT_MODEL_REGISTRY.csv. Per-row Pydantic instantiation (Literal enums + slug regex + access_level int 0-6) + 7-class taxonomy completeness check + FK to baseline_organisation.csv (People Operations Lead = Data Owner per D-IH-73-C).

steps.description: Run scripts/validate_engagement_model_registry.py

people_design_pattern_registry_smoke.description: Initiative 79 P2: standalone PEOPLE_DESIGN_PATTERN_REGISTRY validator smoke (registry mode + jargon-scan mode). Runs scripts/validate_design_pattern_registry.py twice — once in default registry mode (header drift + Pydantic per row + FK resolution to DECISION_REGISTER + INITIATIVE_REGISTRY + consumer_areas semicolon-token validation) and once in --jargon-scan mode (anti-jargon drift gate over People canonicals per D-IH-79-N; mirrors I66 brand-baseline-reality drift gate shape). Tech Lab canonicals are exempt from the jargon scan (they legitimately carry framework names).

steps.description: Run scripts/validate_design_pattern_registry.py (registry mode)
Run scripts/validate_design_pattern_registry.py --jargon-scan (anti-jargon drift gate per D-IH-79-N)

brand_voice_register_smoke.description: Initiative 71 P1 Pack A1: standalone brand voice register validator smoke (10 enforcement layers; strict-day-1 per D-IH-71-F + C-71-8). Loads register-pack.yml from canonicals/_validators/. Scans consumer i18n JSON files for FR anglicisms + ES patterns + EN MBA-deck jargon + 7 AI-tone tic families + anti-LLM-tone catalog. Layers 3-7 + 9 (audience matrix; Storytelling/Resonance boundary; sub-mark archetype; voice persona; locale-leak; cobrand; track-record; brand-abbrev) load as INFO-level chassis pending forward-charter markdown-surface scan.

steps.description: Run scripts/validate_brand_voice_register.py --strict-empty --pack-path canonicals/_validators/register-pack.yml

substrate_audit_smoke.description: Initiative 84 P6: Research Substrate Audit Cadence runbook smoke (paired with SOP-RESEARCH_SUBSTRATE_AUDIT_CADENCE_001.md per akos-executable-process-catalog.mdc Rule 1). Runs scripts/peopl_research_substrate_audit_cadence.py --staleness-check (verifies no SUBSTRATE_REGISTRY row's last_audit_date is > 90 days old per D-IH-84-H quarterly cadence) plus the dedicated pytest suite tests/test_peopl_research_substrate_audit_cadence.py (CLI mode coverage: --staleness-check / --uat-mode / --emit-delta / --list-quarters / default).

steps.description: Run scripts/peopl_research_substrate_audit_cadence.py --staleness-check
Run tests/test_peopl_research_substrate_audit_cadence.py via pytest

impeccable_bridge_drift_smoke.description: Initiative 77 P2: Impeccable bridge drift gate smoke. Asserts every active brand canonical in CANONICAL_REGISTRY.csv (owning_area=Marketing AND owning_role=Brand AND non-SOP) is cited as a cross-reference in >= 1 of the 3 workspace-root bridges (PRODUCT.md / DESIGN.md / BASELINE_REALITY.md) per SOP-HLK_TOOLING_STANDARDS_001.md §3.7 thin-redirect contract. Soft-30d-then-strict default per D-IH-77-C; promote to strict with AKOS_IMPECCABLE_BRIDGE_DRIFT_STRICT=1. Also runs sibling generator in --check mode for coverage report. Pydantic chassis: akos/impeccable_bridge.py.

steps.description: Run scripts/validate_impeccable_bridge_drift.py (soft mode default)
Run scripts/generate_impeccable_bridges.py --check (coverage report; non-mutating)
